description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:latest Docker image, defines the variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS as --batch-mode and MAVEN_OPTS as -Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository, and caches the .m2/repository/ and target/ directories. Define two stages, build and deploy staging. In the build stage add a job named build that runs the commands `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS compile` and `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test`. In the deploy staging stage add a job named deploy staging that runs only on the master branch, sets HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_STAGING_API_KEY, and executes `mvn heroku:deploy` to deploy the artifact to Heroku staging.
